zh.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton於1183年出生在英國薩默塞特。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1230年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton于1183年出生在英国薩默塞特。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1230年在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton was born in 1183, in Somerset, England. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1230, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton est né en 1183, à Somerset, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton wurde 1183 in Somerset, England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton è nato il nel 1183 nel Somerset, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Stapletonは1183年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1230年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton(은)는 1183년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton nasceu em 1183, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton родился в 1183 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1230 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Stapleton nació en 1183, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.

th.Somerset, England: สัเมรสเอต, เอิงแลนด์
